title: Crispy Saudia-Style Crustaceans
description: A tasty and easy-to-make dish inspired by the flavors of Saudia Arabia, featuring crispy crustaceans in a savory stir-fry sauce.
instructions: 1. Rinse the shrimp under cold water and pat dry with paper towels.
2. In a shallow dish, mix together flour, cornstarch, salt, and pepper.
3. Dip each shrimp into the flour mixture, coating both sides evenly.
4. Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
5. Add the coated shrimp to the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side, until golden brown.
6. Remove the shrimp from the skillet and set aside.
7. In the same skillet, add the remaining 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil.
8. Add the minced garlic and chopped onion to the skillet and sauté until the onion is translucent.
9. Add the stir-fry sauce to the skillet and stir to combine.
10. Return the cooked shrimp to the skillet and toss to coat with the sauce.
11. Garnish with crispy fried onions and serve hot.
